subject: revert(ci): drop auth-bypass guard; record prod=dev policy in CLAUDE.md
body:
The guard-auth-bypass workflow assumed a prod/dev split that does not
exist for this project. Sancio is in active development and the
deployed Vercel app is the test environment — AUTH_BYPASS_ENABLED is
intentional across every deployment so the PWA can be tested end-to-end
on a real HTTPS origin. The owner will flip the flag manually and ask
for pre-merge guardrails when the app is ready for real users.

Changes:
- Delete .github/workflows/guard-auth-bypass.yml.
- Add a new AI Note to CLAUDE.md stating "No prod/dev/test separation —
  this project is all one environment" and explicitly forbidding the AI
  from proposing CI gates, env-flag splits, or release-time flip
  workflows unprompted.
- Add a 2026-04-20 entry to docs/AI_MISTAKES.md capturing the
  assumption so this does not repeat next session.

Tags: policy, ci, docs, ai-context
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-docs
Semver: patch
